prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Material transitions, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: unshielded (wrong) rubber coupling underground vs. shielded. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: IPC, mfr listings.
title: Tool and material selection: Material transitions (service call)
